name: Pasta e Fagioli (Macaroni and Beans)
recipeIngredient: 5 cups water, or more as needed
2 cups cooked navy beans, or other beans
15 oz canned tomatoes, drained and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Finely chop the onion and garlic. Saute them along with the basil and oregano in the vinegar until very soft.
2. In a large pot, combine water, bouillon cubes, beans, tomatoes, and parsley. Heat up until well combined.
3. Add the sauteed onions and garlic to the soup. Simmer for about 30-45 minutes.
4. Add the cooked pasta and simmer for another 10-15 minutes.
5. Serve with a sprinkle of grated Parmesan cheese on top if desired.
